subcodes.first_line: O leaf that supplicates unto God! Thy letter was received, but owing to lack of time a brief reply hath been penned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقه المبتهله الی الله نامه شما رسید ولی از عدم فرصت مختصر جواب مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @importance of community building, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
